calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:39am
Judge Pro Tem Glenn Lerner, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Martha Gonzalea present in pro per. Respondent, Jose Jesus Rodriguez present in pro per. Desiree Millikan interprets Spanish/English and English/Spanish on behalf of both the Appellant and the Respondents. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Glenn Lerner.

Case is heard concurrently with case 837724. Respondent Juan Cervantes is present in pro per from case # 837724.

12:34pm
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-15-2011 Judgment Entered
